feat.name: Contact with the Enemy
feat.text: You know that even the best-laid plans rarely survive contact with the enemy, and you have prepared your allies to adapt with a wide array of contingencies. When you use Adaptive Stratagem, you can replace any master tactics or legendary tactics you have prepared with any other tactics in your folio.

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.
